label: Mendelian dyad transmission test (parent × offspring)
description: Binomial-exact two-sided transmission test on parent-heterozygous sites + binomial consistency test on hard Mendelian violations. Reference implementation: pages/hub/mendelian.js::runDyadTest. Server contract: POST /compute/relatedness_mendelian_dyad_test.

label: Mendelian triad multinomial / chi-square 1:2:1
description: Multinomial / chi-square 1:2:1 segregation test on parent_a × parent_b → offspring triads. Reference: pages/hub/mendelian.js::runTriadTest.

label: Cohort Mendelian scan (4-stage hierarchical scoring)
description: 4-stage scoring (Stage 1 family validation → Stage 2 local Mendelian → Stage 3 X-of-Y verdict → Stage 4 transmission test) across candidate × triad cross-product. Async: returns job_id; poll GET /api/jobs/<id>. Reference: pages/hub/inversions.js::scoreInversion.

label: Breeding-partner compatibility search
description: For a focal individual + target karyotype + inversion scope, returns every partner whose cross can produce the target. Sex-aware, kin-exclusion, ambiguity-exclusion filters. Reference: pages/hub/compatibility.js::runCompatibilitySearch.

label: BDMI Test A — Mendelian segregation distortion
description: Per-candidate binomial / chi-square distortion across triads (or hub dyads). Atomic sub-test of bdmi_screen.

label: BDMI Test B — Missing karyotype class
description: Flags candidates where one of AA/AB/BB is <5% but HWE expectation >=15%.

label: BDMI Test C — Heterozygote excess / deficit
description: Compares observed AB frequency to 2pq via |dev|>=30% or HWE chi-square p<0.05.

label: BDMI Test D — Ancestry × genotype interaction
description: Contingency chi-square over [K ancestry components × 3 karyotype classes].

label: BDMI Test E — Long-range forbidden combinations
description: Minimum obs/exp ratio across cross-chromosome candidate pairs; <0.10 fires.

label: BDMI Test F — Phenotype association
description: Phenotype × karyotype association test. Stub until DEMO.phenotype (or a normalized phenotype envelope) is loaded.

label: BDMI screen (combined, with confidence ladder)
description: CHAIN of bdmi_test_a..f with confidence ladder weak/moderate/strong/very_strong/validated. Single bloc combining the six atomic tests; status pill per candidate.

label: Linked inversion regime control (Cramér's V + conditional distortion)
description: For a focal inversion on chromosome C, joins every other candidate on C; reports 3×3 joint table, Cramér's V, mutual information, missing recombinant count, within-stratum HWE chi-square combined p. Verdict: regime-coupled / regime-explained / regime-residual / regime-independent / regime-unknown.

label: Meiotic drive vs underdominance classifier
description: Aggregates DEMO.triads by cross type (AA×AB, AB×BB, AB×AB). Mechanism: meiotic_drive_candidate / underdominance_candidate / linked_regime_explained / ambiguous_distortion / normal_mendelian / possible_genotyping_or_pedigree_error.

label: Single CO / double CO / coincidence / interference calculator
description: Pure formula on user-supplied r1, r2, r12 → C = r12/(r1·r2), I = 1−C. Latent d, x explicitly NOT estimated (identifiability limit).

label: Per-window NCO/Mb track (p map)
description: Per-chromosome NCO/Mb track from population-layer phased haplotypes. GATED on ngsTracts NCO caller; reads synthetic DEMO.recomb_windows.n_NCO_pop today.

label: Per-window CO/(NCO+CO) track (x map)
description: Per-window CO share = CO / (NCO + CO). GATED on ngsTracts per-dyad CO calls; reads synthetic DEMO.recomb_windows today.

label: 2D per-window-pair coefficient of coincidence
description: 2D heatmap of C = r12 / (r1·r2) across window pairs. GATED on ngsTracts per-dyad DCO calls; reads synthetic DEMO.recomb_pairs today.

label: Inversion signature inside-vs-flank verdict
description: Three-track diagnostic (NCO/Mb, CO/meiosis, resolution) + per-candidate verdict: CONSISTENT / REJECT_NO_CO_SUPPRESSION / ANCIENT_COLD_REGION / AMBIGUOUS. GATED on ngsTracts.

label: Focal inversion × meiosis coincidence scan
description: For a focal inversion, compares C on every tested chromosome between carriers (or parental_meiosis parents) and matched non-carriers; family-aware permutation null; intra/inter relation; status STRONG/MODERATE/WEAK/NO_EFFECT/FAMILY_CONFOUNDED. Also runs the causal ladder L0..L5, confounder profile, per-family direction concordance, negative-control null, dose preview. GATED on ngsTracts.

label: Pass-1 → Pass-2 priority ranking
description: One row per inversion: composite priority_score (intra 0.30, inter 0.25, mendel 0.20, family 0.15, marker 0.10); bucket SHIP_TO_PASS2 / HOLD / DROP. GATED on ngsTracts (intra/inter signals synthetic today).

label: Interchromosomal Marker Test Designer
description: For a focal inversion: focal-inversion-state markers (tag SNPs + breakpoint markers) + per-tested-chromosome marker triplets m1-m2-m3 for intervals A and B. Per-chromosome status READY/PARTIAL/LOW_POWER/MISSING. Partly real (focal markers from boundaries); per-chrom grids + expected_DCO synthetic until ngsTracts ships.

label: Focal inversion × meiosis CHAIN (karyotypes → permutation → priority → marker panel)
description: CHAIN: inversion_karyotypes → parental_meiosis_grouping → focal_inversion_meiosis_scan → inversion_priority_rank → marker_panel_design. The manuscript-path target: turns 226-WGS karyotypes into a Pass-2 marker panel ready for 10k–50k offspring validation of interchromosomal effects on crossing over. GATED on ngsTracts (the per-dyad CO/DCO adapter is the blocking dependency for the meiosis legs of the chain).
